nasb.text: “You shall not sow your vineyard with two kinds of seed, or all the produce of the seed which you have sown and the increase of the vineyard will become defiled.

esv.text: “You shall not sow your vineyard with two kinds of seed, lest the whole yield be forfeited, the crop that you have sown and the yield of the vineyard.

cnv.text: “不可把兩樣的種子撒在你的葡萄園裡，免得你所種的全部收成和葡萄園的出產，都要被充公歸與聖所。

ccb.text: “你们不可在葡萄园里种别的作物，否则你们的收成和园中的果子都要充公。
